heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Akira Kurosawa. Written by Ryūzō Kikushima, Hideo Oguni, Eijiro Hisaita, and Akira Kurosawa, based on the novel King's Ransom by Evan Hunter.
clean: Directed by Akira Kurosawa. Written by Ryūzō Kikushima, Hideo Oguni, Eijiro Hisaita, and Akira Kurosawa, based on the novel King's Ransom by Evan Hunter.

heading: Kingo Gondo
raw: A woman wears a hat on her head, but shoes carry all her weight.
clean: A woman wears a hat on her head, but shoes carry all her weight.

heading: Kingo Gondo
raw: A man must kill or be killed.
clean: A man must kill or be killed.

heading: Ginjirô Takeuchi
raw: I'd rather be told the cruel truth than be fed gentle lies.
clean: I'd rather be told the cruel truth than be fed gentle lies.

heading: Ginjirô Takeuchi
raw: Taking the wrong boy was a lucky break. Did you know Mr. Gondo that it's only extortion when you threaten a person or his kin? In other words, this doesn't count. But you have to pay anyway. You're a fool to pay, but pay you must.
clean: Taking the wrong boy was a lucky break. Did you know Mr. Gondo that it's only extortion when you threaten a person or his kin? In other words, this doesn't count. But you have to pay anyway. You're a fool to pay, but pay you must.

heading: Ginjirô Takeuchi
raw: ...Besides, it's amusing to make fortunate men taste the same misery as the unfortunate.
clean: ...Besides, it's amusing to make fortunate men taste the same misery as the unfortunate.

heading: Reiko Gondo
raw: [to her husband, about their son Jun] He takes after you. He likes violent games.
clean: He takes after you. He likes violent games.

heading: Inspector Tokura
raw: Mr. Gondo, I know it's late to be saying this... but you have the right to protect your own livelihood. It's our duty to help you. We want to save the child, but not by sacrificing you.
clean: Mr. Gondo, I know it's late to be saying this... but you have the right to protect your own livelihood. It's our duty to help you. We want to save the child, but not by sacrificing you.

heading: Inspector Tokura
raw: For Mr. Gondo's sake, be bloodhounds!
clean: For Mr. Gondo's sake, be bloodhounds!

heading: Other
raw: Aoki: No human being can kill an innocent child.
clean: No human being can kill an innocent child.

heading: Other
raw: Kawanishi: I know how much this money means to you, but a human life means more.
clean: I know how much this money means to you, but a human life means more.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Kingo Gondo: Why should you and I hate each other?
clean: Why should you and I hate each other?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Ginjirô Takeuchi: I don't know. I'm not interested in self-analysis. I do know my room was so cold in winter and so hot in summer I couldn't sleep. Your house looked like heaven, high up there. That's how I began to hate you.
clean: Ginjirô Takeuchi: I don't know. I'm not interested in self-analysis. I do know my room was so cold in winter and so hot in summer I couldn't sleep. Your house looked like heaven, high up there. That's how I began to hate you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Reiko Gondo: What just happened?
clean: What just happened?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Kingo Gondo: Nothing.
clean: Nothing.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Reiko Gondo: It certainly didn't look that way.
clean: It certainly didn't look that way.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Kingo Gondo: Don't worry. You wouldn't understand. It's business.
clean: Don't worry. You wouldn't understand. It's business.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Reiko Gondo: You always say that to keep me quiet.
clean: You always say that to keep me quiet.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Reiko Gondo: Success isn't worth losing your humanity.
clean: Success isn't worth losing your humanity.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Kingo Gondo: A woman can't understand. This isn't about wanting to become president. I just want to make shoes my way.
clean: A woman can't understand. This isn't about wanting to become president. I just want to make shoes my way.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Inspector Tokura: That Gondo is all right.
clean: That Gondo is all right.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chief Detective 'Bos'n' Taguchi: Usually I waste no love on the rich. I didn't like him at first.
clean: Usually I waste no love on the rich. I didn't like him at first.
